Verified against setup_task.sh which calculates the ground truth summary and writes to this path.
Verified against export_result.sh, which assigns points for exact substring matching of these columns. Note that the task description also asks for 'low_income_households' and 'jobs_per_household'.
Verified against verifier.py which uses this as a threshold for scoring minimum CSV coverage (awards +3 points for >=30 unique zones).
Verified against verifier.py, which returns passed=True only if the total score is >= 60.

privileged_info_summary: The task relies on a real-world San Francisco UrbanSim dataset (sanfran_public.h5) from UDST. Independent analysis confirms the database contains 345,588 households and 225,439 jobs across exactly 189 valid zones (zones containing at least one household). The target low-income threshold (30th percentile of SF household income) exactly evaluates to $34,500.0. The verifier checks for a generated CSV mapping required metrics per zone (expecting at least 30 zones) and a chart image representing the equity gap scores.
